title: tilia illyrica
intro: Tilia illyrica, also known as the Illyrian linden tree or small-leaved linden, is a deciduous tree native to the Balkan Peninsula and parts of Eastern Europe. The bark, flowers, and leaves of the Tilia illyrica plant have been used in traditional medicine for centuries, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The medicinal properties of Tilia illyrica have been associated with various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and promoting a good night's sleep. Tilia illyrica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its calming and soothing effects.
